changes.oldValue: Develop unit tests for 'storylines.ts' to validate narrative branching and character progression.
changes.newValue: Add unit tests for web/src/lib/storylines.ts and web/src/lib/mission.ts. The storylines file exports 4 storylines × 5 chapters each. Tests should verify: all chapters have required fields (briefing, beat1, beat2, resolution), no empty strings, rotation logic (getStorylineForDate) returns correct storyline by day index, getChapterForIndex clamps correctly. Existing test setup is in web/src/lib/__tests__/ (see mission.test.ts for pattern).

newValue.text: All 4 storylines × 5 chapters pass a completeness check (no empty required fields)
getStorylineForDate returns correct storyline for known dates
Tests run with existing test runner (check package.json for test script)
